name: dd-a11y
description: Sharable accessibility audit skill (Claude Code plugin + Codex skill) powered by Playwright and axe-core.

scripts.verify: node -e "const { createRequire } = require('module'); const requireFromSkill = createRequire(process.cwd() + '/package.json'); const { chromium } = requireFromSkill('playwright'); chromium.launch({ headless: true, channel: 'chromium' }).then(async browser => { console.log('Playwright Chromium launch OK'); await browser.close(); }).catch(error => { console.error(error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)); process.exit(1); });"
